name: LanguageSwitching
description: Promote lang-* classes to lang / xml:lang attributes for correct multilingual rendering. Ships a sample generator and a copyable preview flag overlay.

generators.name: Language sample
generators.description: Insert a short multilingual sample (a foreign-language phrase and block) in your text format's class syntax, to demonstrate lang-* switching.

generators.name: Flag overlay (preview)
generators.description: Copy this, then paste into preview/head.xml (choose it from the file dropdown above). Overlays a flag + language title on [lang] elements in the preview only — never packaged. Use Copy, not Insert.
